prompt: Select the correct tool, material, or replacement approach and explain why the observed choice is wrong.
scenario: In a T2 work setting, the evaluated element is E-304 Wire pulling (feeders & branch) within 2.1 Electrical. The relevant subcategory is 2.1.3 Wire & Cable. The observed field condition is: no lubricant on long pull. The work is being assessed at the staged lifecycle state with source anchors NEC 200.6, 210.5 (identification).
title: T2 E-304 Tool & material selection
